description_long: This ice cream shop features a compact, kiosk-style design with a U-shaped counter layout, combining wood paneling and black countertops for a modern yet inviting appearance. The front is adorned with a red-and-white striped awning above the service area, clearly marked with 'Order' and 'Collect' signs, and a circular 'Crepe' logo. The rear wall displays three large menu boards and a small preparation area with utensils and cups. The shop's exterior combines horizontal wood panels with bold red and white stripes, creating a visually striking and approachable facade. The counter surfaces are glossy and dark, contrasting with the lighter wood and vibrant awning. The shop sits on a patch of artificial grass, suggesting a semi-permanent installation suitable for parks or urban plazas.
description: A compact, kiosk-style ice cream shop with wood paneling, red-and-white striped awning, and a U-shaped glossy black counter. Prominent signage and menu boards enhance its modern, inviting look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red-and-white awning, order and collect windows, circular logo, and menu boards on the back wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wood paneling, menu boards, and preparation area with cups and utensils.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wood-paneled back wall and the awning extending from the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the U-shaped counter layout, awning, and the absence of signage or menu boards on this side.
attribute_signage: Circular 'Crepe' logo on the front counter, 'Crepe mamie' text on the wood panel, and three large menu boards on the back wall. Signage is clear, modern, and highly legible.
attribute_service_window_or_counter: A prominent service counter is present at the front, divided into 'Order' and 'Collect' sections, sheltered by a red-and-white striped awning. The counter is wide and easily accessible.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern with retro elements, featuring clean lines, wood paneling, and a bold striped awning.
